model_prompt.title: Exact model prompt file is selected
model_prompt.test: resolveModelInstruction must read .ndx/system/modelprompt/<model>.md when the session model exactly matches the prompt filename.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "model instruction resolves exact model names from file-backed prompt".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The exact model prompt file content is returned without falling through to another prompt.

model_prompt.title: Colon-suffixed model names fall back rightward
model_prompt.test: resolveModelInstruction must strip colon suffixes from the right until an existing model prompt filename is found.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "model instruction strips colon suffixes from the right".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: A model such as gpt-5-codex:lm-studio:local resolves to gpt-5-codex.md when present.

model_prompt.title: Default user prompt is selected when model prompt is absent
model_prompt.test: resolveModelInstruction must use .ndx/system/modelprompt/default.md when no model-specific prompt exists.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "model instruction falls back to default prompt file".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The user-home default prompt file is returned.

model_prompt.title: Bundled default prompt is available before user init
model_prompt.test: resolveModelInstruction must still return the bundled default prompt when the provided or default user home has no .ndx default prompt.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "model instruction falls back to bundled default prompt when .ndx is absent".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The bundled default prompt containing the NDX identity is returned.

model_prompt.title: initNDX seeded default prompt enters buildContext
model_prompt.test: After initNDX seeds the temporary user home, buildContext must include the seeded default model prompt in the developer context.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext uses initNDX seeded default model prompt".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The developer context starts with a model_instruction section containing the seeded NDX default prompt.

model_prompt.title: Model-specific prompt under initialized .ndx overrides default
model_prompt.test: After initNDX, a deliberately added .ndx/system/modelprompt/<model>.md file must override the seeded default prompt in buildContext.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext prefers model-specific prompt files under initialized .ndx".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: The developer context contains only the model-specific prompt in the model_instruction section.

model_prompt.title: Model prompt filenames sanitize slash characters
model_prompt.test: resolveModelInstruction must map slash-bearing model names to underscore filenames before reading prompt files.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "model instruction sanitizes slash characters before reading model prompt files".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

model_prompt.passCriteria: A model such as LOCAL/GPT resolves to local_gpt.md.

agents_cascade.title: Home and project AGENTS instructions are included in order
agents_cascade.test: buildContext must render user-home .ndx/AGENTS.md before the project root AGENTS.md.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "user instructions include user and project AGENTS files in order".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: Both AGENTS files are present as user context sections, and the user-home section precedes the project section.

agents_cascade.title: Project AGENTS cascade reaches cwd ancestors
agents_cascade.test: buildContext must apply AGENTS.md files from projectHome through cwd descendant directories in order, skipping missing files.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "user instructions cascade from project root to cwd descendants".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: home, project root, apps, and agent AGENTS contents appear in that order while a missing cwd AGENTS file is not rendered.

agents_cascade.title: Project AGENTS is not duplicated when cwd equals projectHome
agents_cascade.test: buildContext must render the project AGENTS file exactly once when the session cwd is the declared projectHome.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "user instructions do not duplicate project AGENTS when cwd equals projectHome".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: The project AGENTS content occurs once.

agents_cascade.title: cwd outside projectHome does not leak unrelated AGENTS
agents_cascade.test: buildContext must not read AGENTS.md from cwd when cwd is outside the session's declared projectHome, while environment_context still records the actual cwd.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "user instructions ignore cwd AGENTS outside declared projectHome".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

agents_cascade.passCriteria: Home and project AGENTS contents appear, outside cwd AGENTS content is absent, and environment_context contains the outside cwd.

context_shape.title: User-home system prompt is rendered as developer instructions
context_shape.test: buildContext must render .ndx/system-promt.md from the session user home inside the developer context when present.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "developer instructions read user home .ndx system prompt when present".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

context_shape.passCriteria: The system prompt appears inside a developer_instructions section.

context_shape.title: Missing user-home system prompt is omitted
context_shape.test: buildContext must omit developer_instructions when .ndx/system-promt.md is absent, while retaining model instructions.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "developer instructions are omitted when system prompt is absent".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

context_shape.passCriteria: No developer_instructions section is emitted and the model instruction section is still present.

context_shape.title: buildContext returns developer and user strings with environment metadata
context_shape.test: buildContext must return one developer string and one user string; user context must include cwd, shell, current date, and timezone from session metadata.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext returns one developer string and one user string".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

context_shape.passCriteria: The context output shape and environment_context metadata match the session metadata.
